project.name: SmartTrack Health
project.description: Enterprise HIPAA-compliant care documentation and billing platform for IDD (Intellectual and Developmental Disabilities) service providers

tech_stack.auth: Local JWT (HS256) + bcrypt 6.0 + Google OAuth ID token

architecture.pattern: Flat (Single AppModule, NO NestJS feature modules)

tasks.name: ESLint + Prettier config
tasks.notes: Flat config, single quotes, trailing commas

tasks.name: Flat architecture setup
tasks.notes: controllers/, services/, dals/, entities/, decorators/, guards/, interceptors/, exceptions/

tasks.name: Response interceptor
tasks.notes: Standard envelope, camelToSnake, PHI field stripping

tasks.name: Complete entity layer
tasks.notes: 47 entities, 22 enums, 47 DALs — all phases scaffolded

tasks.name: Auth module (JWT + refresh)
tasks.notes: Local HS256 JWT, bcrypt passwords, Google OAuth ID token signin

tasks.name: Signup / Signin routes
tasks.notes: POST signup, POST signin, POST signin/google, POST refresh

tasks.name: MFA support (TOTP + FIDO2)
tasks.notes: mfa_enabled/mfa_type on UserEntity for display, enforcement deferred

tasks.name: RLS policies
tasks.notes: Migration for 29 tenant tables, append-only audit_logs

tasks.name: Tenant context middleware
tasks.notes: TenantContextInterceptor — SET LOCAL app.current_org_id per request

tasks.name: Audit log module
tasks.notes: AuditLogService — agency + platform, PHI stripped, never throws

tasks.name: Users module
tasks.notes: UserService + UserController, full CRUD, role assignment, sub-permissions, deactivate

tasks.name: Individuals module
tasks.notes: IndividualService + IndividualController, PHI fields encrypted (SSN, DOB, medicaid_id, etc.)

tasks.name: Seed data / dev fixtures
tasks.notes: src/database/seeds/dev.seed.ts — org, users, program, site, individual

tasks.name: Service records module
tasks.notes: ServiceRecordService + 3 controllers (staff/supervisor/admin), state machine, staff ownership

tasks.name: Daily notes module
tasks.notes: DailyNoteService + StaffDailyNoteController, nested under service records, PHI encrypted

tasks.name: MAR module
tasks.notes: MarEntryService + StaffMarEntryController, MarResult enum, PHI encrypted (drug_name/dose/route)

tasks.name: Immutability enforcement
tasks.notes: BadRequestException on update/modify of APPROVED records, validateTransition() enforced

tasks.name: GPS capture + validation
tasks.notes: haversine utility, isWithinRadius vs site coords, non-blocking (location_confirmed flag)

tasks.name: Shift association
tasks.notes: Optional shift_id on punch, inherited from clock-in on clock-out

tasks.name: Double clock-in prevention
tasks.notes: findOpenSession check — BadRequestException if staff+individual already has open session

tasks.name: Correction workflow
tasks.notes: EvvCorrectionService, approve creates new EvvPunch, CORRECTION_TRANSITIONS state machine

tasks.name: EVV to service record linkage
tasks.notes: linkToServiceRecord validates staff+individual match, updates evv_punch_in/out_id columns

tasks.name: Schedule creation
tasks.notes: ShiftService.create, DRAFT default, staff assignment + conflict validation

tasks.name: Staff schedule view
tasks.notes: StaffShiftController — list my shifts, get by ID, date/status filters

tasks.name: Accept/reject workflow
tasks.notes: PUBLISHED to ACCEPTED/REJECTED, staff ownership enforced, responded_at set

tasks.name: Conflict detection
tasks.notes: Same staff + date + overlapping time, excludes terminal states, standalone query endpoint

tasks.name: Schedule-to-EVV linkage
tasks.notes: Phase 4 already stores shift_id on EvvPunch; no additional work needed

tasks.name: Payer configuration module
tasks.notes: PayerConfigService + AdminPayerConfigController, CRUD + deactivate, copies from global

tasks.name: Service codes module
tasks.notes: ServiceCodeService + AdminServiceCodeController, CRUD + deactivate, copies from global

tasks.name: Service authorization management
tasks.notes: ServiceAuthorizationService + billing/admin controllers, CRUD + void + unit tracking

tasks.name: Billing queue
tasks.notes: BillingQueueService + BillingQueueController, enriched queue items with coverage/auth info

tasks.name: Claim generation (service record to claim)
tasks.notes: ClaimMappingService — 7-step mapping (payer, rate, auth, type, build, charge, history)

tasks.name: Claim status lifecycle
tasks.notes: ClaimService — state machine transitions, DRAFT-only edits, replacement claims

tasks.name: Claim line management
tasks.notes: ClaimLineService + BillingClaimLineController, DRAFT-only, auto line numbering

tasks.name: EDI 837 generation
tasks.notes: EdiGeneratorService — clearinghouse JSON payload (V1), batch support. Raw X12 deferred V2

tasks.name: 277 status response processing
tasks.notes: recordResponse maps ACCEPTED/REJECTED 277, updates claim status

base.name: TenantBaseEntity
base.description: Extends BaseEntity, adds org_id for RLS

state_machines.name: SERVICE_RECORD_TRANSITIONS
state_machines.key_rule: APPROVED records are immutable — corrections are append-only

list.name: AuthService
list.description: Signup, signin, JWT, refresh, password reset, Google OAuth

list.name: SubPermissionsService
list.description: Sub-permission checking for granular access control

list.name: EmailService
list.description: Resend SDK — OTP and password reset emails

list.name: IndividualService
list.description: PHI encryption on SSN, DOB, medicaid_id, diagnosis

list.name: ServiceRecordService
list.description: State machine, staff ownership, immutability on APPROVED

list.name: ClaimMappingService
list.description: 7-step mapping: payer, rate, auth, type, build, charge, history

list.name: EdiGeneratorService
list.description: Clearinghouse JSON payload (V1), raw X12 deferred

migrations.name: InitialSchema
migrations.description: Full schema — 47 tables, indexes, RLS policies for 29 tenant tables

migrations.name: AddUserPassword
migrations.description: Add nullable password column to users table

migrations.name: AuthEnhancements
migrations.description: Drop auth0_sub, nullable org_id, email verification fields, OTP, reset token

migrations.name: AddEvvCorrectionIndividualId
migrations.description: Add individual_id column to evv_corrections table

interceptors.name: TenantContextInterceptor
interceptors.description: SET LOCAL app.current_org_id per request for RLS, wraps handler in DB transaction

interceptors.name: ResponseInterceptor
interceptors.description: Standard response envelope, camelToSnake transform, PHI field stripping via @PrivateFields()

utils.name: camelToSnakeCase
utils.description: Deep key transformation for API responses

data_protection.rls: PostgreSQL RLS on 29 tenant tables, SET LOCAL app.current_org_id per request
data_protection.field_encryption: AES-256-GCM for PHI columns (SSN, DOB, medicaid_id, diagnosis, notes, etc.)
data_protection.error_safety: AllExceptionsFilter — no PHI in error responses
data_protection.audit_logging: Append-only, no UPDATE/DELETE on audit_logs table

critical_rules: Money in cents (integer arithmetic, never float)
No PHI in URLs, logs, or error messages
Claims only from APPROVED service records
State machine integrity — no skipping states

golden_thread.description: Core data flow from service delivery to payment reconciliation
steps: Billing pulls APPROVED records into billing queue
835 ERA received and reconciled (Phase 7 — not started)
Payment posted to AR (Phase 7 — not started)

git_history.message: fix: address all Gemini review comments and fix e2e test
ci: add PostgreSQL 16 service container and full test pipeline
feat: add email verification, password reset, org CRUD, and Swagger decorators
feat: add complete entity layer — 47 entities, 22 enums, 47 DALs
feat: scaffold SmartTrack Health backend with flat architecture

next_phase.name: Payment Reconciliation
tasks: 4-priority matching algorithm (claim_id, CLP reference, service date + member, manual)

project_docs: CLAUDE.md — Project conventions, rules, and code standards
spec_docs: docs/SmartTrack Health – Enterprise EVV, Scheduling & Agency Management System.pdf
